title: Pengel Fanart of Mari
wikitext:
[]: Pengel Fanart of Mari             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 27, 2008 6:13 pm Please don't hit me if this is old ;__; You can see the sync clips are part of her character so this leads me to the conclusion that she is in fact a pilot of one of the new Evangelions. I know this has been stated before but maybe this is the prof needed to come to a full conclusion. Again, if this is old and I did spend a min or 2 searching around to see if I could find anything. I assume and I'm sure others have to that she is the pilot of the Evangelion with the Drills. -giga- I feel that Anno is simply looking at the fanfics aspect of things a little to much. The picture says "girlfriend of glasses" now for those who played Girlfriend of Steel..Could this simply be another character that Shinji will have emotion for thus giving Asuka something to be well..Asuka about? The games get Mana and we get this new girl. what do you think and again again if this is old I'm sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 27, 2008 6:48 pm Isn't that Pengel's? (i.e. not official art)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 27, 2008 6:49 pm Yes, that's PenGel.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 27, 2008 8:44 pm Guess that answers my questions then but maybe this is still how it will happen.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 27, 2008 9:05 pm This struck me as fan art the moment I saw it due to how poorly the eyes are drawn in alignment with the face.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 27, 2008 9:09 pm This is just fanart from Pengel. Whether or not Mari is a pilot really isn't known at this point. Girlfriend of Glasses is the name of the doujin Pengel introduced his own take of Mari in.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Dec 28, 2008 1:19 am I should have known this was a story...Well I tried to be helpful on posting something anyway ;; Guess we will have to wait and see huh?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Dec 29, 2008 3:17 pm Where Can I find it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 29, 2008 3:32 pm Assuming by "it" you mean Pengel's stuff -- here

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Dec 29, 2008 3:40 pm I was wondering where or if you could find a copy of the whole actual doujin on the internet, not just pictures of it. I tried clicking on the link on the page you showed, but it wont take me there. *confused*
summary: []: Pengel Fanart of Mari             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 27, 2008 6:13 pm Please don't hit me if this is old ;__; You can see the sync clips are part of her character so this leads me to the conclusion that she is in fact a pilot of one of the new Evangelions. I know this has been stated before but maybe this is the prof needed to come to a full conclusion. Again, if this is old and I did spend a min or 2 searching

[]: Pengel Fanart of Mari             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Dec 27, 2008 6:13 pm Please don't hit me if this is old ;__; You can see the sync clips are part of her character so this leads me to the conclusion that she is in fact a pilot of one of the new Evangelions. I know this has been stated before but maybe this is the prof needed to come to a full conclusion. Again, if this is old and I did spend a min or 2 searching around to see if I could find anything. I assume and I'm sure others have to that she is the pilot of the Evangelion with the Drills. -giga- I feel that Anno is simply looking at the fanfics aspect of things a little to much. The picture says "girlfriend of glasses" now for those who played Girlfriend of Steel..Could this simply be another character that Shinji will have emotion for thus giving Asuka something to be well..Asuka about? The games get Mana and we get this new girl. what do you think and again again if this is old I'm sorry.
